name: lyra-code-review
description: MANDATORY pre-merge review gate. Single unified council-synthesized checklist covering correctness, security, type hygiene, database safety, test existence AND quality, devex regressions, and feature-flag leaks. Rejects dummy tests on sight as P0. Severity-gates every finding P0-P3. Unifies and supersedes code-review and code-review-and-quality.
